hero.subtitle: Gastronomy & Live Music
hero.title: World Cuts,
hero.description: Premium meats carefully selected, prepared with technique and passion. In the heart of Cascais, we offer a unique gastronomic experience where meat excellence meets the vibrant energy of live music.

highlights.title: Premium Meats from Around the World
highlights.description: Each cut is a journey. We select the finest meats from different origins, aged and prepared with technical precision to enhance unique flavors.

items.title: Japanese Wagyu A5
items.description: Exceptional marbling, silky texture and intense flavor. A sublime experience for true connoisseurs.

items.title: Argentinian Black Angus
items.description: Raised on free-range pampas, this cut offers incomparable succulence and authentic robust flavor.

items.title: Aged Tomahawk
items.description: Impressive presentation, 45-day aging. A visual and gustatory spectacle at the table.

items.title: Brazilian Picanha
items.description: The South American classic at its finest. Juicy, flavorful and prepared with traditional technique.

liveMusic.title: Live Music,
liveMusic.description: Every week, we transform dinner into a memorable experience. Immersive sounds, intimate atmosphere and the unique vibe of Cascais at night.

items.name: Michael Thompson
items.text: Hands down the best Tomahawk I've had in Portugal. Sophisticated without pretension, and the live music on Friday night made it absolutely perfect. We'll be back every trip.

items.name: Emma Richardson
items.text: Best meal of our entire Portugal trip. The Picanha was flawless, the service warm and attentive throughout. The evening atmosphere with live music is genuinely something special.

items.name: David Santos
items.text: Exceptional quality from the first bite to the last. You can feel the care that goes into every cut. The Wagyu A5 was a revelation. Highly recommend for any special occasion.

items.name: Laura Martinez
items.text: Welcoming atmosphere, an impressive wine list and meats that genuinely deliver. The team guided us expertly through the menu. A restaurant worth planning your evening around.

items.name: James O'Brien
items.text: We came on a Friday night and the dry-aged Tomahawk for two was a showstopper. Live music, impeccable service, and wine pairings suggested by knowledgeable staff. Superb.

items.name: Anna Kovács
items.text: We chose Latina Grill for our anniversary dinner. It exceeded every expectation — stunning presentation, generous portions and a wine list that impressed even our sommelier friend.

reservation.title: Secure Your Table
reservation.description: Book in advance to guarantee the best experience. Our team is ready to welcome you.

validation.invalidTime: Time must be between 12:30 PM and 11:00 PM

success.title: Reservation Received!
success.message: Thank you! Your reservation has been registered. We'll contact you shortly to confirm.

reservation.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'd like to book a table at Latina Grill Cascais for {date} at {time}, for {guests} people. Name: {name}.

address.label: Address
address.full: Estrada Da Malveira da Serra, 261, 2750-782 Cascais, Portugal

meats.title: House Signature
meats.subtitle:
Exceptional cuts.
Precise ageing.
Open-flame mastery.
meats.description: We source exceptional cuts from distinguished origins, carefully dry-aged and finished over open flame to reveal their fullest character. From Wagyu to Tomahawk, every piece is chosen for its quality, texture, and depth of flavour. More than a meal — a ritual worth remembering.

location.title: Cascais
location.subtitle: Where the Coast Meets the Grill
location.description: Minutes from the beaches of Cascais, Latina Grill is more than a restaurant. It's the destination where the aroma of embers, live music, and the world's finest cuts come together in one unforgettable evening.

reservationCta.title: Book your table — experience Latina Grill at its very best
reservationCta.subtitle: Secure your place for an evening defined by premium cuts, a curated wine list, and an atmosphere you won't soon forget.
reservationCta.note: We recommend booking in advance for Fridays, Saturdays and special occasions.

whatsapp.message: Hi! I would like to make a reservation at Latina Grill Cascais.

home.title: Latina Grill Cascais — Premium Steakhouse & Live Music
home.description: The finest steakhouse restaurant in Cascais. World-class cuts, open grill, wine list and live music on Fridays and Saturdays. Book your table.

menu.title: Menu — Premium Cuts & Wine Pairings | Latina Grill Cascais
menu.description: Japanese Wagyu, dry-aged Tomahawk, Black Angus and sommelier wine pairings. Explore the menu of Cascais's finest steakhouse.

reservations.title: Reservations — Latina Grill Cascais | Restaurant in Cascais
reservations.description: Book your table at Latina Grill, the premium steakhouse restaurant in Cascais. Exceptional cuts, curated wines and live music. Open every day.

contact.title: Location & Contact — Latina Grill Cascais
contact.description: Find us in Cascais. Address, hours and contact details for Latina Grill — premium steakhouse with open grill at Malveira da Serra.
